VSCode 1.43 Syntax Highlight Issue (and How to Fix It)
VSCode updated to 1.43 and suddenly syntax highlighting looks off. Not sure if it's a deliberate change or a bug, but here's how to restore the original highlighting.

VSCode is one of the most-used editors in the world and there are a ton of great extensions out there — but the sheer number can be overwhelming. People keep asking me which ones I use, so here's a list of mine.
Paste Images Straight to Imgur from VSCode

I switched to VSCode for writing posts, but having to upload images through the Imgur website and copy the URL every time was painful. Then I found an extension that handles it inside VSCode — here's how to set it up.
